name: v1alpha1ApplicationStatus
description: v1alpha1ApplicationStatus schema from Argo CD API

conditions.name: Conditions is a list of currently observed application conditions

controllerNamespace.name: ControllerNamespace indicates the namespace in which the application controller is located

history.name: History contains information about the application's sync history

resourceHealthSource.name: ResourceHealthSource indicates where the resource health status is stored: inline if not set or appTree

resources.name: Resources is a list of Kubernetes resources managed by this application

sourceType.name: SourceType specifies the type of this application

sourceTypes.name: SourceTypes specifies the type of the sources included in the application
